scenes.voiceText: (to himself) Ugh, another terrible day...,(whispering to radio) I'm never going to make it... The struggling radio host had lost his mojo.,His ratings were in the tank.
scenes.motionPrompt: Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously
scenes.shotNotes: Animate Jack's Struggle is Real with Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for Jack's Struggle is Real.
shots: Shot A: Establish Jack's Struggle is Real with radio studio,Jack sitting at desk.
Shot B: Push motion with Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to static noise.

scenes.voiceText: (in a deep, smooth voice) Ah, poor Jack...,(laughing) You're so predictable. But little did he know, the studio had a secret.,It was alive, and it was talking back.
scenes.motionPrompt: Studio lights flicker, Jack jumping back in his seat
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Studio Responds with Studio lights flicker, Jack jumping back in his seat. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Studio Responds.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Studio Responds with radio studio,Jack's mouth agape.
Shot B: Push motion with Studio lights flicker, Jack jumping back in his seat.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to dramatic music swell.

scenes.voiceText: (Jack) Wait, what? You can talk?,(Studio) Of course I can, silly. Now, let's get this show on the road. As Jack struggled to comprehend, the studio began to reveal its true nature.,A place where creativity and madness blurred.
scenes.visualPrompt: radio studio,Jack and the Studio talking
scenes.motionPrompt: Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Conversation Begins with Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Conversation Begins.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Conversation Begins with radio studio,Jack and the Studio talking.
Shot B: Push motion with Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to the emotional cue.

scenes.voiceText: (Jack) You're a monster!,(Studio) Ah, but I'm just trying to get the best out of you, dear. The studio's true intentions were sinister.,It had been manipulating Jack all along, using his fears and doubts.
scenes.motionPrompt: Studio lights dimming, Jack backing away slowly
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Dark Truth with Studio lights dimming, Jack backing away slowly. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Dark Truth.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Dark Truth with radio studio,Jack's horrified face.
Shot B: Push motion with Studio lights dimming, Jack backing away slowly.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to the emotional cue.

windowsScript.content:
@echo off
setlocal
mkdir "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth" 2>nul
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(to himself) Ugh, another terrible day...,(whispering to radio) I'm never going to make it... The struggling radio host had lost his mojo.,His ratings were in the tank." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(in a deep, smooth voice) Ah, poor Jack...,(laughing) You're so predictable. But little did he know, the studio had a secret.,It was alive, and it was talking back." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) Wait, what? You can talk?,(Studio) Of course I can, silly. Now, let's get this show on the road. As Jack struggled to comprehend, the studio began to reveal its true nature.,A place where creativity and madness blurred." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) You're a monster!,(Studio) Ah, but I'm just trying to get the best out of you, dear. The studio's true intentions were sinister.,It had been manipulating Jack all along, using his fears and doubts." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth_voice.wav" --scene "04"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "radio studio,Jack sitting at desk" --motion "Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "radio studio,Jack's mouth agape" --motion "Studio lights flicker, Jack jumping back in his seat" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "radio studio,Jack and the Studio talking" --motion "Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "04" --visual "radio studio,Jack's horrified face" --motion "Studio lights dimming, Jack backing away slowly" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "7e8f674f6967419d7be38575" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/the-voice-in-the-booth_final_episode.mp4"
echo Episode build complete.
endlocal

bashScript.content:

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(to himself) Ugh, another terrible day...,(whispering to radio) I'm never going to make it... But little did he know, the studio had a secret.,It was alive, and it was talking back." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) Wait, what? You can talk?,(Studio) Of course I can, silly. Now, let's get this show on the road. As Jack struggled to comprehend, the studio began to reveal its true nature.,A place where creativity and madness blurred." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) You're a monster!,(Studio) Ah, but I'm just trying to get the best out of you, dear. The studio's true intentions were sinister.,It had been manipulating Jack all along, using his fears and doubts." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth_voice.wav" --scene "04"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "radio studio,Jack sitting at desk" --motion "Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "radio studio,Jack and the Studio talking" --motion "Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins.mp4"

python build_concat_manifest.py --job "7e8f674f6967419d7be38575" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/the-voice-in-the-booth_final_episode.mp4"

voiceCommands: python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(to himself) Ugh, another terrible day...,(whispering to radio) I'm never going to make it... The struggling radio host had lost his mojo.,His ratings were in the tank." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real_voice.wav" --scene "01"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(in a deep, smooth voice) Ah, poor Jack...,(laughing) You're so predictable. But little did he know, the studio had a secret.,It was alive, and it was talking back." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds_voice.wav" --scene "02"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) Wait, what? You can talk?,(Studio) Of course I can, silly. Now, let's get this show on the road. As Jack struggled to comprehend, the studio began to reveal its true nature.,A place where creativity and madness blurred." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "(Jack) You're a monster!,(Studio) Ah, but I'm just trying to get the best out of you, dear. The studio's true intentions were sinister.,It had been manipulating Jack all along, using his fears and doubts." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth_voice.wav" --scene "04"
renderCommands: python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "radio studio,Jack sitting at desk" --motion "Jack fidgeting with pen,looking around nervously" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_01_jack-s-struggle-is-real.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "radio studio,Jack's mouth agape" --motion "Studio lights flicker, Jack jumping back in his seat" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_02_the-studio-responds.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "radio studio,Jack and the Studio talking" --motion "Studio equipment spinning around,Jack gesturing wildly" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_03_the-conversation-begins.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "04" --visual "radio studio,Jack's horrified face" --motion "Studio lights dimming, Jack backing away slowly" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voice-in-the-booth/scene_04_the-dark-truth.mp4"
executionNotes: Run voice generation first so every scene gets a concrete WAV asset.
Run the renderer second so each scene produces its own MP4 file in the job output directory.
Run the ffmpeg concat build last to assemble the final episode from the rendered scene clips.
